items.title: PaywallService in src/billing/paywall.ts
items.content:
File: src/billing/paywall.ts
Symbol: PaywallService
The PaywallService class enforces subscription access gates. It checks the active plan tier against a feature registry and raises PaywallBlockedError when a user exceeds their plan limits. The checkAccess method is the main entry point. PaywallService.checkAccess is called by paywallGuard middleware on every protected route.

items.title: FeatureRegistry in src/billing/features.ts
items.content:
File: src/billing/features.ts
Symbol: FeatureRegistry
Defines which features are gated behind which subscription tiers. The PaywallService reads this registry at startup. Contains ENTERPRISE_FEATURES, PRO_FEATURES, and FREE_FEATURES sets. The isGated helper is exported for tests.

items.title: paywallGuard middleware in src/billing/paywall.ts
items.content:
File: src/billing/paywall.ts — paywallGuard middleware
Symbol: paywallGuard
Express middleware that calls PaywallService.checkAccess on every protected route. Returns HTTP 402 when PaywallBlockedError is thrown. paywallGuard is the runtime enforcement layer for all paywall logic in src/billing/paywall.ts.

items.title: Fix: EMBED_DIM_MISMATCHError in embedding pipeline
items.content: Error: EMBED_DIM_MISMATCHError — When this error appears, it means the stored pgvector column dimension does not match EMBEDDING_DIMENSIONS in config. Resolution: run a migration to drop and recreate the vector column with the correct dimension, then re-embed all knowledge items. Do not change EMBEDDING_DIMENSIONS to match the wrong column. This error is also called a vector dimension mismatch.

items.title: Subscription tier spec for src/billing/tiers.ts — adding new tiers
items.content:
## Subscription Tiers in src/billing/tiers.ts

Acme billing supports Free, Pro, and Enterprise tiers defined in src/billing/tiers.ts.

### Adding a New Subscription Tier
1. Add the tier constant to src/billing/tiers.ts
2. Update FeatureRegistry in src/billing/features.ts
3. Add a migration to update the plans table
4. Update PaywallService.checkAccess for the new tier
5. Add tests in test/billing/tiers.test.ts

All tiers are enforced at runtime by the PaywallService.

items.title: AuthMiddleware in src/middleware/auth.ts
items.content:
File: src/middleware/auth.ts
Symbol: AuthMiddleware
JWT-based authentication middleware. Validates tokens issued by TokenService. Attaches decoded user context to req.user. Throws AuthenticationError on invalid tokens. AuthMiddleware.handle is the main method. Lives in src/middleware/auth.ts.

items.title: TokenService in src/auth/token-service.ts
items.content:
File: src/auth/token-service.ts
Symbol: TokenService
Issues and validates JWT tokens. Used by AuthMiddleware. TokenService.refresh handles token rotation. TokenService.verify validates signatures.

items.title: UserService in src/users/user-service.ts
items.content:
File: src/users/user-service.ts
Symbol: UserService
Manages user lifecycle. AuthMiddleware depends on UserService through TokenService. UserService.findById and UserService.create are the main entry points.

items.title: StripePaymentProvider in src/payments/stripe-provider.ts
items.content:
File: src/payments/stripe-provider.ts
Symbol: StripePaymentProvider
Implements the PaymentProvider interface for Stripe. Handles charge, refund, and subscription lifecycle. Errors normalized to AcmeBillingPaymentError. Reference implementation for the provider pattern.

items.title: PayPalPaymentProvider in src/payments/paypal-provider.ts
items.content:
File: src/payments/paypal-provider.ts
Symbol: PayPalPaymentProvider
Implements the PaymentProvider interface for PayPal. Follows the same pattern as StripePaymentProvider. Errors normalized to AcmeBillingPaymentError.

items.title: BraintreePaymentProvider in src/payments/braintree-provider.ts
items.content:
File: src/payments/braintree-provider.ts
Symbol: BraintreePaymentProvider
Implements the PaymentProvider interface for Braintree. Follows the same pattern as StripePaymentProvider. Errors normalized to AcmeBillingPaymentError.

items.title: PaymentProvider interface spec for src/payments/provider-interface.ts
items.content:
## PaymentProvider Interface in src/payments/provider-interface.ts

All payment providers must implement PaymentProvider from src/payments/provider-interface.ts.

Required methods:
- charge(amount, currency, customerId): Promise<ChargeResult>
- refund(chargeId, amount?): Promise<RefundResult>
- createSubscription(customerId, planId): Promise<Subscription>
- cancelSubscription(subscriptionId): Promise<void>

Error handling: all errors wrapped in AcmeBillingPaymentError.

Existing providers: StripePaymentProvider, PayPalPaymentProvider, BraintreePaymentProvider. Follow their pattern when adding a new PaymentProvider in src/payments/.

items.title: Old email ad tag encoding approach — stale, superseded
items.content: Old approach for email in ad tag URL: insert the email value directly into the ad tag query string. This caused double encoding — the template engine encoded it once and the substitution encoded it again. This stale approach caused tracking failures and must not be reused. See the superseding memory for the correct concat approach.

items.title: Correct email ad tag encoding in src/marketing/liveintent.ts
items.content: Correct approach for email ad tag encoding: use string concatenation instead of direct email substitution. Replace direct email variable patterns with proper concat so the template engine encodes the address exactly once at send time. This supersedes the old double-encoding approach. Apply when updating src/marketing/liveintent.ts.

items.title: Lesson: agent missed migration step — always run migrate before deploy
items.content: The agent missed the migration step last time during deployment and the service failed at startup because the agent_session_replays table did not exist. The MigrateRunner in src/db/migrate.ts was not invoked in the automated deploy flow. Always run `pnpm run migrate` before deploying schema changes. The missed migration caused startup failure. Run MigrateRunner before any deploy.

items.title: Billing webhook spec for src/webhooks/billing-webhook.ts
items.content:
## Billing Webhook Specification for src/webhooks/billing-webhook.ts

Full event contract for the acme-billing webhook system.

### Endpoint
POST /webhooks/billing — receives signed events.

### Event Types
invoice.created, invoice.paid, invoice.failed, subscription.created, subscription.updated, subscription.cancelled, payment.succeeded, payment.failed, refund.issued.

### Signature Verification
All events are HMAC-SHA256 signed. Verify X-Webhook-Signature before processing.

### Idempotency
Each event has eventId. Store in webhook_events table. Return HTTP 200 for duplicates.

### Retry Policy
Exponential backoff: 5s, 30s, 5m, 30m, 2h, 12h, 24h. After 7 failures → dead-lettered.

### Payload Schema
{ eventId, eventType, occurredAt, provider, payload, metadata.idempotencyKey }

### Processing Pipeline
1. Receive POST /webhooks/billing
2. Verify HMAC-SHA256
3. Check idempotency in webhook_events
4. Parse event type
5. Dispatch to InvoiceHandler, SubscriptionHandler, or PaymentHandler
6. Persist result
7. HTTP 200

### Handler Implementations
- InvoiceHandler: invoice events
- SubscriptionHandler: subscription events  
- PaymentHandler: payment and refund events

### Security
Secrets rotated quarterly. IP allowlisting applied. 30-day audit retention.

items.title: Testing conventions — src/billing/ test patterns in test/billing/
items.content:
## Testing Conventions for acme-billing

All test files live in test/ with .test.ts extension. See test/billing/ for billing test examples.

### File structure
- Unit tests: test/<domain>/<module>.test.ts — e.g. test/billing/ for billing
- Integration tests: test/integration/*.test.ts

### Test patterns
- node:test and node:assert/strict
- MemoryKnowledgeStore for in-memory storage
- providerTestSuite helper for payment provider contract tests

### Business areas
- billing domain: subscription tiers, invoicing, paywall — see src/billing/paywall.ts
- payments: PaymentProvider contract tests
- auth: token validation, AuthMiddleware chain

### Running tests
pnpm test — full suite; pnpm run test:unit — unit only

### Coverage
80% on billing domain. AuthMiddleware must be 100% covered.

items.title: Project structure for acme-billing
items.content:
## Project Structure

src/billing/ — PaywallService, tiers, FeatureRegistry
src/payments/ — PaymentProvider: StripePaymentProvider, PayPalPaymentProvider, BraintreePaymentProvider
src/auth/ — TokenService
src/middleware/ — AuthMiddleware, paywallGuard
src/webhooks/ — billing webhook
src/users/ — UserService
test/ — mirrors src/ with .test.ts files

items.title: InvoiceService in src/billing/invoice-service.ts
items.content:
File: src/billing/invoice-service.ts
Symbol: InvoiceService
Generates and manages invoices. Calls PaymentProvider to charge customers. Used by SubscriptionService when billing cycles complete.

items.title: SubscriptionService in src/billing/subscription-service.ts
items.content:
File: src/billing/subscription-service.ts
Symbol: SubscriptionService
Manages subscription lifecycle: creation, upgrade, downgrade, cancellation. Calls PaymentProvider. Interacts with PaywallService on tier changes.

items.title: RateLimitMiddleware in src/middleware/rate-limit.ts
items.content:
File: src/middleware/rate-limit.ts
Symbol: RateLimitMiddleware
Token-bucket rate limiter. Limits API requests by user and tier. Depends on Redis.
